features.description: Create plugin repository scaffold with .claude-plugin/plugin.json manifest, README.md, and directory skeleton (skills/, agents/, templates/)

verification.criteria: .claude-plugin/plugin.json validates; skills/, agents/, templates/ directories exist; README.md present

features.description: Implement language and framework detector in agents/project-analyzer.md: detect primary language, framework, and package manager from project manifests

verification.criteria: Agent correctly identifies language/framework for Python+FastAPI, Node+Express, Go, Rust projects

features.description: Implement test-framework and linter/type-checker detector: inspect devDependencies, tool config files to identify test runner and static analysis tooling

verification.criteria: Detects pytest/jest/vitest, ruff/eslint, pyright/tsc correctly

features.description: Implement database and external-service detector: scan config files, docker-compose.yml, .env.example for known adapters (postgres, redis, neo4j, qdrant, mongo)

verification.criteria: Populates databases[] array correctly for projects with/without databases

features.description: Implement top-level module enumerator: list project modules, count files per module, compute complexity score (S/M/L/XL) per module

verification.criteria: Returns name, fileCount, lineCount, complexityScore for each module

features.description: Implement sharp-edge pattern scanner: grep for dangerous patterns (eval, exec, raw SQL, shell=True, TODO density) and return findings with severity

verification.criteria: Returns findings for fixture with shell=True; empty for clean fixture

features.description: Author generic language-agnostic rule template at templates/rules/generic.md with paths frontmatter and placeholder sections

verification.criteria: Valid markdown with paths frontmatter, rule entries, and placeholder tokens

features.description: Author Python-specific rule template at templates/rules/python.md with paths targeting *.py, rules for type-hints, ruff/pyright, migration safety

verification.criteria: Valid markdown with paths: **/*.py; references pyright and ruff

features.description: Author TypeScript-specific rule template at templates/rules/typescript.md with paths targeting *.ts/*.tsx, strict-mode, no-any policy

verification.criteria: Valid markdown with paths: **/*.ts; references tsc and eslint

features.description: Author Go-specific rule template at templates/rules/go.md with paths targeting *.go, go vet/staticcheck, error-wrapping conventions

verification.criteria: Valid markdown with paths: **/*.go; references go vet

features.description: Author Rust-specific rule template at templates/rules/rust.md with paths targeting *.rs, clippy, unsafe block docs, cargo test

verification.criteria: Valid markdown with paths: **/*.rs; references cargo clippy

features.description: Implement rule file generator: for each module, select matching template, substitute tokens, write to .claude/rules/ — skip existing files

verification.criteria: Creates .claude/rules/ files per module; re-run doesn't overwrite; tokens substituted

features.description: Author run-tests skill template parameterized by test runner (pytest/jest/vitest/go test/cargo test)

verification.criteria: Renders valid SKILL.md for each test runner with no un-substituted tokens

features.description: Author lint skill template parameterized by linter (ruff/eslint/golangci-lint/clippy) with fix flag

verification.criteria: Renders correctly for each linter with no un-substituted tokens

features.description: Implement skill file generator: for each relevant skill template, substitute tokens and write to .claude/skills/ — skip existing

verification.criteria: Creates skills with correct commands; no template tokens remaining; idempotent

features.description: Implement CLAUDE.md auditor: count lines, flag bloated if >200, list redundant sections without modifying the file

verification.criteria: Returns bloated:true for 250-line file; never writes to CLAUDE.md

features.description: Implement CLAUDE.md generator: if no CLAUDE.md exists, generate from language-specific template using detected metadata

verification.criteria: Creates CLAUDE.md only when absent; contains correct project name, test command, lint command

features.description: Author CLAUDE.md starter templates for Python, TypeScript, Go, and generic with token placeholders

verification.criteria: Each template has {{PROJECT_NAME}}, {{TEST_COMMAND}}, {{LINT_COMMAND}} tokens; renders cleanly

features.description: Implement structure-score calculator: score 0-100 based on CLAUDE.md (20), rules (30), skills (20), sharp-edge docs (15), test framework (15)

verification.criteria: Score 0 for empty project; 100 for fully configured; before <= after on setup

features.description: Compose main setup skill: orchestrate full workflow — analyze, generate rules, generate skills, audit/generate CLAUDE.md, calculate score, print report

verification.criteria: Running /platxa-project-structure:setup produces report with created files and before/after score

features.description: Write plugin README.md with install command, usage, supported languages, non-destructive guarantee

verification.criteria: README has install command, usage, language matrix, non-destructive policy
